case_title: PETER C. FARMER, DDS, INC. VS. JEREMY ENNIS

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $523.00 FILED BY PETER C. FARMER, DDS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ENNIS, JEREMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-21-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETER C. FARMER, DDS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENNIS, JEREMY $523.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $608.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETER C. FARMER, DDS, INC.
